audit_result: No Schur violation occurs near the barrier in the sampled grid. Schur violations, if present, occur below the barrier and are harmless.
connection_to_previous_certificate: The exact_all_two_level_shell certificate closes the threshold endpoint. This lemma is the missing compression step from arbitrary multilevel barrier points to two-level threshold points.
consequence: If true, every Robin-Hood/T-transform that equalizes coordinates cannot decrease F on the barrier. Hence a non-equal barrier maximizer compresses toward a two-level threshold obstruction; the exact all-two-level certificate then rules it out.
name: Barrier Schur Compression Lemma
statement: For w=12,16, on the barrier region F(theta)>=0, the gradient of the Act-visible shell objective is oppositely sorted to theta: (theta_i-theta_j)(g_i-g_j)<=0 for all i,j, where g=grad F.
